closure_text: Walden Pond State Reservation, including bathrooms, will be open tomorrow 11/23 during regular park hours 7am-4pm. The Visitor Center and the Thoreau Society Bookstore will be closed in observance of Thanksgiving.
Starting Friday, December 1st the Boat Ramp at Walden Pond will be closed for the winter season, reopening April 1, 2024 (weather permitting)

Walden Pond State Reservation will be open regular hours 7am-4pm on Christmas Eve and Christmas Day. The Visitor Center and @ThoreauSociety shop at Walden will be closed in observance of the holiday. Bathrooms in the Visitor Center will remain open to the public on Christmas Day.
Walden is closed for visitor capacity. Park will reopen when crowds thin.

closure_text: Due to the forecasted winter storm and in order to allow staff adequate time to safely clear parking lots, pathways, and other areas, all DCR Visitor Centers statewide will be closed to the public on Sunday, January 25 and Monday, January 26.
Due to the pending winter storm, Walden Pond Visitor Center will be closed on Monday, February 23, 2026 per Department of Conservation and Recreation (DCR) advisory.

BOAT RAMP UPDATE:
Tomorrow, Thursday April 2, 2026, the boat ramp will be closed for the duration of the day to accommodate ongoing construction work.  We apologize for the inconvenience.  The boat ramp is expected to reopen the following day, Friday April 3rd.

⏳Hours of Operation Update ⌛️
Beginning Sunday, May 3rd, 2026 Walden Pond State Reservation hours will be 7:00AM - 7:30PM
The main exit gate will lock promptly at 8:00PM
Boat ramp access will be 5:00AM - 7:30PM

BOAT RAMP UPDATE:
To accommodate ongoing construction work, the boat ramp parking area will be closed from 5AM-1PM Monday 5/18 and Tuesday 5/19.  We apologize for the inconvenience.
Please check back for further updates.
